text.title: django-quality-security Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to apply the baseline, ramp HSTS / CSP safely, and gate every deploy.

step.name: audit-settings
step.action: Diff against `templates/production_settings.py`. Identify missing security settings, current HSTS value, CSP middleware presence/mode.
step.decision-gate: If every setting matches and `manage.py check --deploy` is clean, skip to step 6.

step.name: apply-transport-baseline
step.action: Add missing flags. Set HSTS to 300 on first deploy. Install Django 6.0+ ContentSecurityPolicyMiddleware (or django-csp) in report-only mode with a permissive baseline policy.
step.decision-gate: Deploy to staging; collect 24h CSP report-only telemetry before tightening the policy.

step.name: rate-limits
step.input: list of auth endpoints + public API endpoints
step.action: For DRF: configure DEFAULT_THROTTLE_CLASSES (anon + user) and a `login` scope at 5/min. Install django-axes; configure AXES_IPWARE_PROXY_COUNT to match infra. Remove stacked ratelimit decorators if both libraries present.
step.decision-gate: Run a staging-side load test that exceeds the limit; confirm 429 is returned and axes lockout fires.

step.name: input-validation
step.input: views and serializers handling user input
step.action: Grep for `objects.extra(`, raw SQL with string formatting, mass-assignment patterns. Replace with Form / Serializer. Add magic-byte upload validation. Call `full_clean()` in service functions.
step.decision-gate: No `objects.extra` or unsafe SQL in source tree (ruff custom rule or grep CI step).

step.name: secrets-and-checks
step.action: Move every secret to env. Add `system_checks.py` checks for SECRET_KEY default and missing SENTRY_DSN. Register in `apps.py ready()`. Add CI step `python manage.py check --deploy --fail-level WARNING`.

step.name: emit-report-and-ramp
step.action: Render `templates/audit-report.md`. Schedule HSTS ramp (300 → 3600 over 1 week → 31536000 after 2 weeks). Move CSP from report-only to enforce after telemetry clean for 48h.
